phase: Phase 2 — tense-swap of flexible present-tense verbo items (BULK)
method: Recast pronoun-subject present-tense depth items into other tenses (past-compound / imperfect / future) with a leading time-marker; person held fixed. Distractors = same verb+person across tenses. verbecc generated, gate OFF (pt). Compound-past skipped for être/essere-auxiliary verbs (participle agreement verbecc does not resolve). Excludes already-time-marked, reflexive, impersonal, implied/ambiguous-subject items. BULK run overrides the methodology hold (sample-only until Phase-1 review); ships to beta pre-review, flagged for native review — tense-swaps can read oddly for stative sentences.
